creator: koukopoulos@gmail.com
text:
The file ports/head/Mk/bsd.ocaml.mk has the fbsd:nokeywords SVN property set even if it contains a $FreeBSD: keyword. Therefore this keywords doesn't get updated and additionally it contains the same file path as the ports/branches/releng_9_2/Mk/bsd.ocaml.mk.

How-To-Repeat: $ svn proplist ports/head/Mk/bsd.ocaml.mk
